name: Request Clarification
description:
Ask the customer (human) a clarifying question. Use this when you need more information, want to confirm understanding, or need a decision before proceeding.

This pauses the workflow and returns control to the human. Their response will be provided in your next activation.

Use this instead of making assumptions when requirements are ambiguous.

question.description: The question to ask the customer

context.description: Why this clarification is needed - helps the customer understand the importance

implications.description: What choosing this option would lead to

options.description: Optional: present structured choices to the customer

default_option.description: If options provided, which one you'd recommend if the customer doesn't respond

status.description: Whether the customer has responded yet

selected_option.description: If options were provided, which one was selected

input.question: What tone would you like for this story?
input.context: The tone will affect word choice, pacing, and themes throughout.

input.question: Just to confirm: you want a mystery story set in a Victorian mansion with 3 acts?
input.context: I want to make sure I understood your request correctly before starting.
